adb_commands.factory_reset: adb -s {device} shell am broadcast -a android.intent.action.FACTORY_RESET --receiver-foreground -p android -es "android.intent.extra.REASON" "ExitRetailModeConfirmed" -ez "android.intent.extra.WIPE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" true -ez "com.android.internal.intent.extra.WIPE_ESIMS" true

skip_oobe.user_setup_complete: adb -s {device} shell settings put secure user_setup_complete 1
skip_oobe.device_provisioned: adb -s {device} shell settings put global device_provisioned 1
skip_oobe.system_locales: adb -s {device} shell settings put system system_locales en-US
skip_oobe.go_home: adb -s {device} shell am start -a android.intent.action.MAIN -c android.intent.category.HOME

adb_commands.screen_timeout: adb -s {device} shell settings put system screen_off_timeout {timeout_ms}

log_commands: am broadcast -a com.debug.loggerui.ADB_CMD -e cmd_name stop --ei cmd_target 1 -n com.debug.loggerui/.framework.LogReceiver
am broadcast -a com.debug.loggerui.ADB_CMD -e cmd_name set_sublog_5_0 --ei cmd_target 1 -n com.debug.loggerui/.framework.LogReceiver
am broadcast -a com.debug.loggerui.ADB_CMD -e cmd_name set_log_size_61440 --ei cmd_target 1 -n com.debug.loggerui/.framework.LogReceiver
am broadcast -a com.debug.loggerui.ADB_CMD -e cmd_name start --ei cmd_target 1 -n com.debug.loggerui/.framework.LogReceiver

1.name: 恢复出厂设置专项
1.description: 模拟用户恢复出厂设置，通过OOBE.bat跳过开机向导

2.name: UI联机重启专项
2.description: 通过模拟用户操作长按Power键点击重启按钮

3.name: ADB reboot重启专项
3.description: adb命令重启手机，进到桌面后执行5分钟原生monkey

4.name: 连贯执行全部专项
4.description: 依次执行：恢复出厂设置 -> UI联机重启 -> ADB reboot重启

5.name: 开关机专项
5.description: 使用adb shell setprop sys.powerctl shutdown关机，等待手动开机后再次关机

6.name: 休眠唤醒专项
6.description: 按电源键灭屏，静置待机预设时间，再按电源键亮屏，循环执行

7.name: 开关机加休眠唤醒专项
7.description: 先执行开关机专项，再执行休眠唤醒专项，循环执行
